lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਈ ਜੋ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੇ ਗੁਨ ਗਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: maaee jo prabh ke gun gaavai |
lines.english: O mother, how fruitful is the birth of one who sings the Glories of God,

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਵਗੰਧਾਰੀ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: devagandhaaree 5 |
lines.english: Dayv-Gandhaaree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਫਲ ਆਇਆ ਜੀਵਨ ਫਲੁ ਤਾ ਕੋ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਵੈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: safal aaeaa jeevan fal taa ko paarabraham liv laavai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: and enshrines love for the Supreme Lord God. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਉਚਾਰੁ ਕਰੇ ਹਰਿ ਰਸਨਾ ਬਹੁੜਿ ਨ ਜੋਨੀ ਧਾਵੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naam uchaar kare har rasanaa bahurr na jonee dhaavai |1|
lines.english: He chants the Naam, the Name of the Lord, with his tongue, and does not have to wander in reincarnation again. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰਨ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਰਵਿਆ ਮਨ ਤਨ ਮਹਿ ਆਨ ਨ ਦ੍ਰਿਸਟੀ ਆਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: pooran braham raviaa man tan meh aan na drisattee aavai |
lines.english: The Perfect Lord God pervades his mind and body; he does not look upon any other.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁੰਦਰੁ ਸੁਘੜੁ ਸੂਰੁ ਸੋ ਬੇਤਾ ਜੋ ਸਾਧੂ ਸੰਗੁ ਪਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: sundar sugharr soor so betaa jo saadhoo sang paavai |
lines.english: Beautiful, wise, brave and divine is one who obtains the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਰਕ ਰੋਗ ਨਹੀ ਹੋਵਤ ਜਨ ਸੰਗਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਜਿਸੁ ਲੜਿ ਲਾਵੈ ॥੨॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: narak rog nahee hovat jan sang naanak jis larr laavai |2|14|
lines.english: Hell and disease do not afflict one who joins the Company of the Lord's humble servants, O Nanak; the Lord attaches him to the hem of His robe. ||2||14||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚੰਚਲੁ ਸੁਪਨੈ ਹੀ ਉਰਝਾਇਓ ॥
lines.translit: chanchal supanai hee urajhaaeo |
lines.english: His fickle mind is entangled in a dream.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਵਗੰਧਾਰੀ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: devagandhaaree 5 |
lines.english: Dayv-Gandhaaree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਤਨੀ ਨ ਬੂਝੈ ਕਬਹੂ ਚਲਨਾ ਬਿਕਲ ਭਇਓ ਸੰਗਿ ਮਾਇਓ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: eitanee na boojhai kabahoo chalanaa bikal bheo sang maaeo |1| rahaau |
lines.english: He does not even understand this much, that someday he shall have to depart; he has gone crazy with Maya. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਲੋਭ ਸੁਨੈ ਮਨਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਕਰਿ ਮਾਨੈ ਬੇਗਿ ਤਹਾ ਉਠਿ ਧਾਇਓ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: lobh sunai man sukh kar maanai beg tahaa utth dhaaeo |1|
lines.english: Hearing about greed, he feels happy in his mind, and he runs after it. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੁਸਮ ਰੰਗ ਸੰਗ ਰਸਿ ਰਚਿਆ ਬਿਖਿਆ ਏਕ ਉਪਾਇਓ ॥
lines.translit: kusam rang sang ras rachiaa bikhiaa ek upaaeo |
lines.english: He is engrossed in the delight of the flower's color; he strives only to indulge in corruption.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰੀ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮਿ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਨਾਨਕ ਲੀਓ ਸਮਾਇਓ ॥੨॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: karee kripaa paarabraham suaamee naanak leeo samaaeo |2|15|
lines.english: Granting His Grace, the Supreme Lord Master has blended Nanak with Himself. ||2||15||

lines.gurmukhi: ਫਿਰਤ ਫਿਰਤ ਬਹੁਤੁ ਸ੍ਰਮੁ ਪਾਇਓ ਸੰਤ ਦੁਆਰੈ ਆਇਓ ॥
lines.translit: firat firat bahut sram paaeo sant duaarai aaeo |
lines.english: Wandering and roaming all around, I have endured great pain, but now, I have come to the door of the Saint.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਵਗੰਧਾਰੀ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: devagandhaaree 5 |
lines.english: Dayv-Gandhaaree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਬ ਸੁਖਾ ਗੁਰ ਚਰਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: sarab sukhaa gur charanaa |
lines.english: All peace is found in the Guru's feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਜਾ ਅਰਚਾ ਸੇਵਾ ਬੰਦਨ ਇਹੈ ਟਹਲ ਮੋਹਿ ਕਰਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: poojaa arachaa sevaa bandan ihai ttehal mohi karanaa |
lines.english: This is the labor which I perform: worship, flower-offerings, service and devotion.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਲਿਮਲ ਡਾਰਨ ਮਨਹਿ ਸਧਾਰਨ ਇਹ ਆਸਰ ਮੋਹਿ ਤਰਨਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kalimal ddaaran maneh sadhaaran ih aasar mohi taranaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: They drive away my sins and purify my mind; their Support carries me across. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਗਸੈ ਮਨੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਪਰਗਾਸਾ ਬਹੁਰਿ ਨ ਗਰਭੈ ਪਰਨਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: bigasai man hovai paragaasaa bahur na garabhai paranaa |1|
lines.english: My mind blossoms forth and is enlightened, and I am not cast into the womb again. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਫਲ ਮੂਰਤਿ ਪਰਸਉ ਸੰਤਨ ਕੀ ਇਹੈ ਧਿਆਨਾ ਧਰਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: safal moorat parsau santan kee ihai dhiaanaa dharanaa |
lines.english: I behold the fruitful vision of the Saint; this is the meditation I have taken.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਇਓ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾਲੁ ਠਾਕੁਰੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਕਉ ਪਰਿਓ ਸਾਧ ਕੀ ਸਰਨਾ ॥੨॥੧੬॥
lines.translit: bheo kripaal tthaakur naanak kau pario saadh kee saranaa |2|16|
lines.english: The Lord Master has become Merciful to Nanak, and he has entered the Sanctuary of the Holy. ||2||16||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਾਰਿ ਪਦਾਰਥ ਅਨਦ ਮੰਗਲ ਨਿਧਿ ਸੂਖ ਸਹਜ ਸਿਧਿ ਲਹੀਐ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: chaar padaarath anad mangal nidh sookh sehaj sidh laheeai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: You shall obtain the four blessings, and the treasures of bliss, pleasure, peace, poise and the spiritual powers of the Siddhas. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਪੁਨੇ ਹਰਿ ਪਹਿ ਬਿਨਤੀ ਕਹੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: apune har peh binatee kaheeai |
lines.english: Offer your prayer to your Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਵਗੰਧਾਰੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: devagandhaaree mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Dayv-Gandhaaree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਂਚ ਨ ਲਾਗੈ ਅਗਨਿ ਸਾਗਰ ਤੇ ਸਰਨਿ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਕੀ ਅਹੀਐ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aanch na laagai agan saagar te saran suaamee kee aheeai |1|
lines.english: The heat of the ocean of fire does not affect one who longs for the Lord and Master's Sanctuary. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਨੁ ਤਿਆਗਿ ਹਰਿ ਚਰਨੀ ਲਾਗਉ ਤਿਸੁ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਅੰਚਲੁ ਗਹੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: maan tiaag har charanee laagau tis prabh anchal gaheeai |
lines.english: Renounce your self-conceit, and grasp hold of the Guru's feet; hold tight to the hem of God's robe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਟਿ ਪਰਾਧ ਮਹਾ ਅਕ੍ਰਿਤਘਨ ਬਹੁਰਿ ਬਹੁਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਸਹੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: kott paraadh mahaa akritaghan bahur bahur prabh saheeai |
lines.english: Again and again, God puts up with the millions of sins of the supremely ungrateful ones.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਵਗੰਧਾਰੀ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: devagandhaaree 5 |
lines.english: Dayv-Gandhaaree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰੁਣਾ ਮੈ ਪੂਰਨ ਪਰਮੇਸੁਰ ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਸੁ ਸਰਨਹੀਐ ॥੨॥੧੭॥
lines.translit: karunaa mai pooran paramesur naanak tis saranaheeai |2|17|
lines.english: The embodiment of mercy, the Perfect Transcendent Lord - Nanak longs for His Sanctuary. ||2||17||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੇ ਚਰਨ ਰਿਦੈ ਪਰਵੇਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: gur ke charan ridai paravesaa |
lines.english: Place the Guru's feet within your heart,

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੋਗ ਸੋਗ ਸਭਿ ਦੂਖ ਬਿਨਾਸੇ ਉਤਰੇ ਸਗਲ ਕਲੇਸਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: rog sog sabh dookh binaase utare sagal kalesaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: and all illness, sorrow and pain shall be dispelled; all suffering shall come to an end. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮ ਜਨਮ ਕੇ ਕਿਲਬਿਖ ਨਾਸਹਿ ਕੋਟਿ ਮਜਨ ਇਸਨਾਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: janam janam ke kilabikh naaseh kott majan isanaanaa |
lines.english: The sins of countless incarnations are erased, as if one has taken purifying baths at millions of sacred shrines.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਗਾਵਤ ਗੁਣ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਲਾਗੋ ਸਹਜਿ ਧਿਆਨਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naam nidhaan gaavat gun gobind laago sehaj dhiaanaa |1|
lines.english: The treasure of the Naam, the Name of the Lord, is obtained by singing the Glorious Praises of the Lord of the Universe, and centering one's mind in meditation on Him. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਅਪੁਨਾ ਦਾਸੁ ਕੀਨੋ ਬੰਧਨ ਤੋਰਿ ਨਿਰਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: kar kirapaa apunaa daas keeno bandhan tor niraare |
lines.english: Showing His Mercy, the Lord has made me His slave; breaking my bonds, He has saved me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਵਗੰਧਾਰੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: devagandhaaree mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Dayv-Gandhaaree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਈ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੇ ਚਰਨ ਨਿਹਾਰਉ ॥
lines.translit: maaee prabh ke charan nihaarau |
lines.english: O mother, I long to see the Feet of God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਪਿ ਜਪਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਜੀਵਾ ਤੇਰੀ ਬਾਣੀ ਨਾਨਕ ਦਾਸ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੇ ॥੨॥੧੮॥ ਛਕੇ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: jap jap naam jeevaa teree baanee naanak daas balihaare |2|18| chhake 3 |
lines.english: I live by chanting and meditating on the Naam, and the Bani of Your Word; slave Nanak is a sacrifice to You. ||2||18|| Third Set of Six||
